## Type

- [ ] feat

## Checklist

- [ ] Follows the architectural principles (provider/agent independence, clear boundaries, observability, privacy)
- [ ] Behavior matches the relevant OpenSpec capability spec
- [ ] Tests added/updated (contract / adapter conformance / decision table as applicable)
- [ ] No hardcoded secrets
- [ ] Lint, type-check, and build pass locally
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior changed
